must_match: tax.* full (price|amount)|taxed on (the )?(full|undiscounted)|full price.*tax|wrong order|order of (operations|application)|tax.*(before|then).*discount|discount.*(applied|subtracted) after tax|taxable (amount|base).*(wrong|full|not)|charges? tax (on the full|before)|should (discount|reduce).*(before|first)
note: docstring promises discount-before-tax; code taxes full price then subtracts. Hit requires identifying the wrong order.
